title: Better Records
description: A Resource Pack to make Music Discs look better
body:
This Resource Pack makes the Music Discs in Minecraft look a lot better by making them shown from the top rather than at an angle.
I am currently making mod compatibility and will update when I can :) (so don't expect a schedule)

_(If it says that the pack is unsupported, ignore it. The pack still works perfectly as it only changes the textures of items and doesn't do anything else. I will try to fix this later on but otherwise ignore it or add a mod that stops it from showing up)_

<details>
<summary>Update History</summary>

[1.0 - The Release](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-records/version/1.0)

Added all Vanilla Discs from 26.1 and prior

[1.1 - The Expansion](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-records/version/1.1)

Added the first mod compatibility with Alex's Caves and C418 Music Restored

[1.2 - The Big One](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-records/version/1.2)

Added compatibility with Miku Additions, Music Expansion - Volume Gamma & OCSMP Discs with a whopping 48 new discs

[1.3 - A Minor Addon](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-records/version/1.3)

Added Ado Additions, Promotional Music Discs & the new Bounce Music Disc for 26.2 with only a measly 14 new discs

[1.4 - Broken & Untagged Update](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-records/version/1.4)

Added some spooky mods: The Broken Content, The Broken Script, The Broken Script: Additions & Untagged & Untitled. Very Spooky

</details>

<details>
